---
title: "Creating R packages in RStudio"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2014-03-08"
categories:
  - "Estadística"
  - "R"
  - "Stats"
---

RStudio is a powerful tool in hands of the applied statistician. For example, you can create beautiful documents using KnitR, which combine both LaTeX and R; you also can make beautiful presentations with Markdown. However, RStudio also serves as a friendly platform to create R packages. The following video will guide you in this easy quest.

[YouTube](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9PyQlbAEujY?rel=0)
